title: Senpai Lilly's Origin SMP
description: A vanilla+ pack designed for the Lilly's Senpai Origin SMP. We aim to cater to casual players with this pack.
body:
A place where you can build your dreams.

We've put together a vanilla+ pack for our SMP where you can build towns, taverns or even participate in lore with other players. So hop in and hang out with team and voice chat. Let your imagination inspire your creative side!


Choose one of the origins and classes that will assist or hinder your gameplay in many ways.

There are so many things to do, and plenty to see and explore with WWOO, Tectonic, Incendium, Better Nether & End


Never a dull moment anywhere you travel to.

This mod pack has been designed with playability in mind, meaning there is so much for you to do and explore.

So many possibilities for your experience on the SMP!!

[Click here to join the discord!!](https://discord.gg/YNW5bh9gRM)
![<3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/725a16f453fcc4162dc3089caddb744d6530dca9.png)
